name: Parfait Amour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the sugar syrup in a large jar.
2. Shake well.
3. Let steep for two weeks.
4. Remove the vanilla bean (optional).
5. Filter the liquid if desired to remove sediment.
6. Add the sugar syrup and stir well.
7. Start with 1 cup of sugar syrup, then gradually add more until reaching the desired sweetness, stirring and tasting as you go along.
